name: Chocolate Thumbprints #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a baking sheet with Golden Crisco Shortening.
2. In a large bowl, combine the shortening, granulated sugar, milk, vanilla, and egg yolk. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add melted chocolate and mix well.
3. Gradually add flour and salt to the chocolate mixture, mixing until fully combined. Stir in the chocolate chips. Form the dough into 2-inch (5 cm) balls and place them on the baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
4. Gently press a thumb into the center of each cookie.
5. Bake for 8 minutes. Press down the centers after baking. Transfer to a cooling rack and allow to cool completely.
6. Fill each cooled cookie with Peanut Butter Cream Filling.
Makes: 2 1/2 dozen cookies. Preparation Time: 25 minutes. Baking Time: 8 minutes.
